JUDGE WICK, REPORTER MARCIA HOLMES. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED, TERMS READ INTO THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE STIPULATED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: STIPULATED JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED HEREIN FOIR DISBURSEMENT OF FUNDS INTERPLEADED AND DEPOSITED WITH THE CLERK OF THE COURT HEREIN, TOTALLING $6,389.07, ACCORDING TO THE FOLLOWING DIS- TRIBUTON. PLTF. L/O OF PATRICK E. CATALANA, $1000 DEFT. SHARON BLAIM $1139.07 DEFT. FAIRMONT INSURANCE COMPANY $1500 DEFT. MITCHELL TONG &MARIN CENTER OF ACUPUNCTURE $2000 DEFT. EDWYN NAZARIAN M.D. $750 IT IS FURTHER STIPULATED BY THE PARTIES THAT THE COMPLAINT IN INTERPLEADER HEREIN AND THE X-COMPLAINT OF DEFT AND X-COM PLAINANT SHARON BLAIR SHALL BE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE. EACH RELEASES ANY AND ALL CLAIMS AND CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST ALL OTHER PARTIES HERETO, WHETHER OR NOT RELATED TO THIS ACTION.
